summary: Completed Phase 1 (core semantic switch from <= to <) and partial Phase 2 (T-axiom removal from Axiom type). Discovered architectural requirement: density/discreteness soundness must be split by frame class.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for irreflexive G/H refactoring phases 1-2

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 complete, Phase 2 partial. Handoff written with detailed next steps for SoundnessLemmas.lean and Soundness.lean updates.

completion_data.completion_summary: Switched temporal semantics from reflexive to irreflexive, removed T-axioms from Axiom type, added frame-class predicates. Phase 1 of 14 complete.
